unit.scope: Full client vitest suite (122 files). New: stop-hook.test.ts (8), transcript-fingerprints.roundtrip.test.ts (5 boundary probe), session-parser.test.ts mode-change/pr-link/stop-hook blocks (+22), PrLinkCard.test.tsx (3), StopHookCard.test.tsx (4), TranscriptRow.test.tsx dispatch tests (+3), useAutoScroll.test.ts AC4 intent-detach block (+5; replaced the obsolete 250ms guard-window re-pin test).

e2e.scope: Playwright spec 90 (90-transcript-renderer-fingerprints.spec.ts) against a live worktree stack (Hono :3947 + Vite :5273, SHIPWRIGHT_NETWORK_PROFILE=local): seeds mode/pr-link/stop-hook/plain-user JSONL, asserts PR card href+text, stop-hook collapsed->expand, plain user survives, mode pill hidden-by-default then visible after system toggle, zero bubble-unknown. Passed 1.5s.

design_fidelity.scope: New cards reuse the established SkillCard/PermissionModePill CSS-var token set; no new design tokens.

smoke.scope: No server / API / dev-server change; client-only transcript renderer + scroll-hook change. Worktree stack booted only to drive the E2E.

surface_verification.justification: Backend-affects-frontend rule: change is client-only transcript rendering, but surface=web was run anyway (medium always-cell). E2E spec 90 drove the real UI entry point against a live stack.
